## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build && npm test` pass locally
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` (if user-facing)
- [ ] New detector? registered in `DETECTORS` and added a rule in `fix.ts` `CANONICAL`
- [ ] Pricing change is verified (`exact: true`) or left approximate (`exact: false`)
- [ ] `core/` stays free of CLI/process concerns
